PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Continued To Oct-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Pupach appeared by telephone for Marian Dickey (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there was no response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Pupach stated that he was informed by the Examiner that they needed an appraisal, that they found an Appraiser out of San Mateo County, that it can take up to 60-days, and requested a continuance to file the inventory and appraisal and address the other issues that were raised in the Examiner's notes. Mr. Pupach also stated that the other heir is his Client's Brother, that the Brother has since died and that Humboldt County made an order that the Brother's interest goes to Ms. Dickey. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is continued to October 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Pupach is to have his documents filed no later than one week prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-15-2019 Continued To Jul-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
